subject: criminal-law
title: Anticipatory Bail Rejected? Here Is What You Can Do Next
excerpt: Anticipatory bail rejected? You still have options — approach the High Court, file an SLP, or apply for regular bail after arrest. Know your rights under BNSS 2023.

subject: criminal-law
title: Bail Conditions Too Harsh? How You Can Get Them Modified or Relaxed
excerpt: Bail conditions crushing your daily life? Passport gone, daily reporting, surety too high? You can move the court to modify or relax them. Here is how.

subject: criminal-law
title: Charge Sheet Not Filed in 60 or 90 Days? Your Right to Walk Out — Default Bail Explained
excerpt: Charge sheet not filed in 60 or 90 days? You have an indefeasible right to bail under Section 167(2). Here is how to claim it before the chargesheet arrives.

subject: criminal-law
title: Family Member Just Arrested? How to Get Bail the Same Day — A Plain-Language Guide
excerpt: A family member has just been arrested. Here is the safe road for the next 24 hours — bailable vs non-bailable, the 24-hour rule, and same-day Magistrate bail.

subject: criminal-law
title: Got a Section 41A Notice From the Police? Why You Probably Do Not Need Bail at All
excerpt: Police gave you a Section 41A notice in a 498A or non-arrest case? You are not arrested. You probably do not need bail. Here is what the notice means and what to do.

subject: criminal-law
title: Name in FIR But Innocent — What to Do, Step by Step
excerpt: Name in an FIR but you are innocent? Know your rights under BNSS — pre-arrest notice, anticipatory bail, FIR quashing and false-FIR remedies.

subject: criminal-law
title: How to File an FIR Online in India: A 2026 Plain Guide
excerpt: Plain-English guide to filing an FIR online in India under BNSS Section 173 — Zero FIR, e-FIR, cybercrime portal, and what to do if police refuse.

subject: family-law
title: Can Grandparents Get Custody of Child in India?
excerpt: Can grandparents get custody of child India? Learn when courts may consider grandparents, natural guardians, welfare, and practical next steps.
